title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Netmeds Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Netmeds Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Join the Netmeds Holdings Services family as a Frontend Developer in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Netmeds Holdings Services:
Netmeds Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netmeds Holdings Services!
